Notes: GBC ends 3-game losing streak ... Wilmington's 5th loss in last 7 games ...
GBC's 9th straight win over Wilmington ... Chukwueze (GBC) has 8th straight
double-digit scoring game ... Spence (WU) has 5th straight 20-pt. game (10th
this year) ... Richmond-Peters (GBC) has season-high 15 rebounds.
Game.Officials: John Powers (R),  Kristi Mosley,  Mike White
